data.description:
## Summary
`test_enrich_queue_prune_never_drops_concurrent_locked_writes` fails on git 2.54 CI
(Linux, all Python tiers) with `error: invalid object <sha> ... error: Error building
trees` ŌĆö a writer's locked `append_event` commit fails, is swallowed, and the write is
lost (`lost == swallowed_write_raises`, counts vary 17..232/250).

## Proven root cause (confirmed by reproduction + forensics)
The tickets store is a linked git worktree (`.tickets-tracker`) that SHARES the parent
repo's object database. On git >= 2.47, `git commit` triggers `git maintenance run --auto
--detach` ŌĆö a DETACHED background process that runs `git repack -d -l --cruft --write-midx`.
Under concurrent writes, MULTIPLE such detached maintenance processes run OUTSIDE rebar's
write lock, racing the concurrent writers and each other, and corrupt the shared object DB
(missing/dangling objects; hundreds of `tmp_pack_*` garbage files). git's own docs warn a
concurrent `git gc` "may corrupt the repository"; plain gc/maintenance-detach does not take
the object-db lock. Directly observed: 4+ concurrent `git maintenance run --auto --detach ->
git repack --cruft` processes live during the failure, while rebar's own write lock shows 0
overlaps (it serializes its own git perfectly ŌĆö the corruption is 100% from git's detached
maintenance escaping the lock).

## Why prior fixes did not resolve it
- WU-1 (epic 97e7) unset `gc.auto` + set `gc.autoDetach=true`, trusting "stock git gc is
  safe by construction" ŌĆö that reasoning covers only SERIAL reachability, never a CONCURRENT
  background repack racing in-flight writes.
- 4c1c's `_recover_from_invalid_object` heal treats the downstream symptom (poisoned index)
  and cannot recover a HEAD-referenced missing object (read-tree HEAD re-poisons).
- `gc.auto=0` does NOT disable it: git >= 2.47 uses `git maintenance run --auto` (gated by
  `maintenance.auto`), not the legacy `git gc --auto`.

## Evidence
- git 2.47.3 -> 0 repro; git 2.54.0 -> reproduces (Docker, isolated).
- Diagnostic: zero-concurrency / writers-only / single-pair all PASS; only the full
  concurrent config fails, with live detached maintenance repack processes captured.
- Prior art: git-gc/git-maintenance docs; ArgoCD #25101 (identical: git 2.47 detached
  maintenance escaping a lock on a shared git dir); GitLab/Gitaly `gc.auto=0`; Homebrew
  `gc.autoDetach=false`.

## Fix direction (pending final experimental confirmation)
Disable background auto-maintenance on the tickets worktree ŌĆö `maintenance.auto=false`
(+ `gc.auto=0`, + `*.autoDetach=false` defense-in-depth) ŌĆö so no detached maintenance can
race writers; PRESERVE WU-1's bounded-growth by running gc/maintenance SERIALIZED under
rebar's write lock (`git maintenance run --task=gc`). Confirm `maintenance.auto=false` vs
foreground `autoDetach=false` empirically before choosing.

## Reproduction Steps
1. On git 2.54, init a rebar store; run 5 writer procs (SIGNATURE/REVIEW_RESULT bursts) +
   4 pruner procs (enqueue + `_prune_queue_events`) concurrently against it.
2. Observe some writers' `append_event` fail with `invalid object ... Error building trees`
   and background `git maintenance run --auto --detach` processes running.
- Expected: no writes lost. Actual: writes lost (corrupted shared object DB).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `_gc_config_unit` disables background auto-maintenance (`maintenance.auto=false` +
  `gc.auto=0`) so no detached `git maintenance`/`git gc` can run concurrently with writers;
  proven by a test asserting the store's effective config after `init`.
- [ ] Bounded-growth (WU-1) preserved via a serialized-under-write-lock gc/maintenance path,
  OR an explicit, documented decision to defer it.
- [ ] `test_enrich_queue_prune_never_drops_concurrent_locked_writes` re-enabled (skip
  removed) and green on the git-2.54 CI matrix (proving command: that test on CI).
- [ ] gc-config + ensure-drift-matrix tests updated to the new posture; docs (sync.py,
  concurrency.md, init.py `_gc_config_unit`) corrected to state that concurrent background
  maintenance is unsafe.
data.title: enrich-prune flake root cause: git>=2.47 detached 'git maintenance run --auto' corrupts the shared tickets-worktree object DB
